safeHeatMeta.purpose: Offline map base for the SafeHeat operations screen. Bundled; never fetched at runtime.
safeHeatMeta.licenseNote: Item carries the standard City of Austin GIS informational-use disclaimer. Unlike the cooling-center layers, this item does state terms.
safeHeatMeta.caveat: Council districts are an administrative boundary. They are NOT the demo zones and must not be labeled as heat risk.
